ChooseWhenText: Choose it when City B needs the refined mana line back online without stacking too much new strain into the return leg.
WatchOutText: It restarts more slowly than the Greedy Path and caps the payout ceiling earlier.
FollowUpHintText: Usually leaves the next dispatch steadier and easier to chain if the city still needs another run.
PartyFitText: Best with Bulwark or Salvager-style crews that prefer guarded tempo and reliable carry.
CombatPlanText: Expect guarded goblin fights, modest recovery windows, and a steadier route into the elite room.
EventFocus: Watchfire recovery and guard cache keep the line orderly.
RewardPreview: Steadier processing restart with a guarded captain finish.
ExpectedNeedImpactText: Lower ceiling, cleaner restart for City B.
